---
output: hugodown::md_document
title: "Expanse"
date: 2020-08-24
trailer: "gallery/expanse/preview/set4_ff_05_11_3_10.jpg"
splash:
  image: "gallery/expanse/extra/ff_05_11_3_10.jpg"
  caption: "Expanse"
---

```{r include=FALSE}
source("../../diziet.R")
```

```{r echo=FALSE, results='asis'}
diziet$make_gallery()
```
